---
title: "👋 Hi, I'm Andrew"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  image-height: 0px
  fields: [title, description, date]
  date-format: long
page-layout: article
title-block-banner: false
---

I'm a data scientist in the Raleigh-Durham area, with a PhD in sociology and an MS in statistics from Duke. I use this site to showcase side projects I've built — the best place to start is the featured series below. If you want to get in touch: carr.andrewjohn \[at\] gmail \[dot\] com.

## Featured project

```{=html}
<div class="featured-card">
    <span class="featured-badge">Three-part series</span>
    <p class="featured-title">AutoML, end to end</p>
    <p class="featured-desc">A custom AutoML package for predictive modeling — built from scratch,
    benchmarked against Prophet and sktime, and deployed to AWS with Terraform, GitHub Actions,
    and SageMaker.</p>
    <ol class="featured-parts">
      <li><a href="posts/auto_ml/index.html">Building the tool</a></li>
      <li><a href="posts/auto_ml_benchmarking_ts/index.html">Benchmarking it against Prophet and sktime</a></li>
      <li><a href="posts/deployment/index.html">Deploying it on AWS</a></li>
    </ol>
    <p class="featured-code"><i class="bi bi-github"></i>
      <a href="https://github.com/AndrewCarr24/automl_tool">automl_tool</a> ·
      <a href="https://github.com/AndrewCarr24/automl-deploy">automl-deploy</a></p>
</div>
```

## All posts
